available.message: Scout now! Your weekly scouting reset is ready.

cooldown.message: Scouting on cooldown. Next scouting available in {hours}h {minutes}m.

logic.check_availability: if current_timestamp >= next_available_timestamp then scouting is available
logic.update_after_scout: set last_scout_timestamp = current_timestamp; next_available_timestamp = current_timestamp + cooldown_days
logic.sync_with_ui: update scouting button state and show notifications dynamically
